title: CAC outcomes: 2026
body: "This page gives the outcomes and decisions for applications to the CAC under all jurisdictions from 1 January 2026 to 31 December 2026.  The outcomes for earlier applications are available at CAC outcomes: 2014 and earlier, CAC outcomes: 2015, CAC outcomes: 2016, CAC outcomes: 2017, CAC outcomes: 2018, CAC outcomes: 2019, CAC outcomes: 2020, CAC outcomes: 2021, CAC outcomes: 2022, CAC outcomes: 2023, CAC outcomes: 2024 and CAC outcomes: 2025 "
